description: Test default data sorting, verify order changes via column/icon clicks, handle ASC/DESC toggling. Ensure proper icon display and multi-column sorting logic. Validate performance with large datasets.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default sort order
expected_result: Data is sorted by ASC/DESC (base on spec)
Sorted columns is displayed correctly with a sort icon.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Column name the first time
expected_result: Data is sorted by ASC/DESC correctly (base on spec)
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Column name the second time
expected_result: Data is sorted by ASC/DESC correctly (base on spec)
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Column name multi times
expected_result: Data is switched between ASC/DESC order correctly
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on multi column names which has sort function
expected_result: Sorting is correct in all column (Sort all column by AND condition)
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Sort icon the first time
expected_result: Data is sorted by ASC/DESC correctly (base on spec)
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Sort icon the second time
expected_result: Data is sorted by ASC/DESC correctly (base on spec)
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on Sort icon multi times
expected_result: Data is switched between ASC/DESC order correctly
Sort icon is changed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when click on multi Sort icons
expected_result: Sorting is correct in all column (Sort all column by AND condition)
Sort icon is changed correctly

description: Verify sorting stability after adding/removing/updating rows, especially with large data. Confirm sorting order and icons remain consistent post-edits.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Delete/Update/Add new row and then sort
expected_result: Sorting is correct in all column
Icon should change following on sorting ASC/DESC

test_view_points.viewpoint: Delete/Update/Add new row while sorting (has big data)
expected_result: Sorting is correct in all column (base on spec)
Icon should change following on sorting ASC/DESC

description: Test cross-tab/browser consistency during copy-paste operations. Ensure compatibility with major browsers (IE, Firefox, Chrome, Safari).

test_view_points.viewpoint: Copy/paste page has sorting list data to another Tab or another Browser
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Sort data on some browser (IE, Firefox, Chrome, Safari...)
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly

description: Validate preserved sorting order in saved/exported files. Confirm data integrity after re-importing sorted files.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Save/download list data file to local device and check sorting columns in file
expected_result: Sorting is correct in all column (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import list data file to App and check sorting
expected_result: On the screen display same list data that is imported (Base on spec)

description: Test sorting across paginated data, including page navigation and browser Back/Next actions. Ensure order consistency throughout pages.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check sorting when list data contains many pages
expected_result: Base on requirement will sort in only one page or all pages

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation: Sort => Click any page => Page 1
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation: Sort => Next/Previous paging
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check repeated page navigation and sorting interactions
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check browser Back/Next navigation impact
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly base on spec

description: Check user role impacts (Admin/Normal) on sorting functionality post-data changes. Validate consistent display across roles.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify sorting after Admin deletes rows and Normal user views
expected_result: All columns still sort correctly base on spec
User only view role can see data list is sorted correctly
